description: Style Note One casual garment that'll make you look sophisticated in an instant is this t-shirt from status quo. The quirky print on the chest renders a subtle charm to the tee, while the soft blended fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team it with jeans and Sports shoes for a touch of style. Product DetailsBlack t-shirt, has a round neck, short sleeves with brand tag on the left sleeve, stitch detailing  and graphic print on the front Material and Care Blended fabric Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
